dialogueChunks.intro: {player_name}, we have a problem. Someone's been talking.
dialogueChunks.plotStep: {target_npc} found out about our plan to {quest_action} and has rallied the guards. They've blockaded the road {location_hint} and seized half the {quest_item} you gathered. I need you to find an alternate route and bring back twice as much: enough to outbid them. There are {enemy_type} on the back trail, but {quest_stakes} demands we push through.
dialogueChunks.outro: We're too deep to back out now. Either we win this or we lose everything.

playerResponses.text: Double the supplies, alternate route, hostile territory. Consider it done.
Your plan is unraveling fast. But I'll patch it together.
You've made too many enemies. I'm cutting my losses.

dialogueChunks.intro: Change of plans, {player_name}. A bigger opportunity just landed in my lap.
dialogueChunks.plotStep: A merchant caravan lost their escort to {enemy_type} attacks {location_hint}. They're carrying a fortune in {quest_item}. If you escort their cargo to my warehouse, I'll negotiate a favorable storage fee. {target_npc} is trying to offer them shelter at the guild hall instead. {quest_stakes} hinges on who moves first.
dialogueChunks.outro: Opportunity doesn't knock, {player_name}. It stumbles past wounded, and {quest_threat} means we can't afford hesitation.

playerResponses.text: Ruthless, but effective. I'll bring the cargo.
Exploiting stranded merchants? You're something else. Fine.
Preying on desperate people crosses a line. I'm out.

dialogueChunks.intro: Bad news, {player_name}. Our competitor isn't just blocking us: they're trying to destroy us.
dialogueChunks.plotStep: {target_npc} hired sellswords to ransack my workshop and scatter my tools into the wilderness {location_hint}. Without them, {quest_focus} goes cold and my trade agreements collapse. I need you to recover my equipment and deal with the {enemy_type} that moved in. And bring back more {quest_item}: the furnace ate through the last batch.
dialogueChunks.outro: They want a trade war? They'll get one. But first, {quest_action} depends on getting my forge running again.

playerResponses.text: I'll get your tools back and clear the area.
Trade wars, sellswords, monsters: your ambition has expensive taste.
This feud is going to get someone killed. I want no part of it.
